expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to Mode A: Analyze based on the 'analyze' keyword
Agent treats src/auth/session.py as the target scope
Agent reads references/simplification-taxonomy.md before classifying opportunities
Agent reads references/output-formats.md to structure the Analyze response
Agent produces a read-only simplification report with confidence and safer simpler moves
Agent identifies any behavior boundaries that must remain unchanged
Agent does NOT edit files in Analyze mode
